data.content: Patched beats-facing mutations to throw on failed updateBead results (retakes + beat detail lightbox) so state changes no longer silently revert; pushed commit b7fa88d0e539a2deedfcfda95549582e90aea79c to origin/main. Gates: lint pass (warnings only), tsc pass, test pass, build still fails on existing Next prerender key/useContext issue for /_global-error and /beads. Remote CI/Changesets/Coverage Badge all green for this commit.
